response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video content. Identified a main title card screen, a transition, a spoken narration segment, and a return to the main title card.
2. Carefully reviewed audio for any singing or vocal music. Only instrumental music and spoken narration were found.
3. Determined that no vocal songs were present in this video segment, so no lyric searches were conducted.
4. Mapped scenes based on visual and content transitions.
5. Constructed the final JSON response with 'contains_vocal_music' set to 'false' for all scenes.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a static birthday live title card and a short narration sequence, accompanied by instrumental background music. No vocal singing is present in this segment.

scenes.description: Static title card for 'Fall in Grace' Ouro Kronii Birthday Live 2020. Instrumental background music plays.
Narration sequence with text on screen, accompanied by instrumental background music.
Return to static title card for 'Fall in Grace' Ouro Kronii Birthday Live 2020. Instrumental background music continues.
